title: Ubiquiti UniFi Switch USW-Lite-16-PoE
description: USW-Lite-16-PoE is a Gigabit PoE L2 Switch from Ubiquiti in a desktop design with a maximum PoE budget of 45W . A manageable switch with 16 Gigabit metal ports and a total throughput of 16 Gbps . Only 8 ports of 16 support PoE+ powering 802.3af/at with a maximum power of 30W/port. Thanks to its low PoE budget, the switch is more suitable as a data device with power to a few devices at the edge of the network The major difference between the UniFiSwitch and EdgeSwitch series switches is in management - WebGUI management of EdgeSwitch switches is replaced by the UniFi Controller on UniFi Switch models Device Power cord
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (16) 10/100/1000Mbps Power Power type Mains power (230V) PoE type PoE-Out (only) PoE-Out standards 802.3af, 802.3at PoE Out ports 8 PoE budget [W] 45 Max. power consumption [W] 15 Power via connector/terminal 230V AC Physical characteristics Design Desktop Fans No Chassis design Plastic Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 15 up to 40 Width [mm] 192 Height [mm] 44 Depth [mm] 185 General Switchning capacity [Gbps] 16 Jumbo frame [Bytes] 9000
